name: ENNIS, INC.
summary: Ennis, Inc. (formerly Ennis Business Forms, Inc.) is a Texas-organized trade printer founded in 1909, manufacturing a broad range of printed business products including business forms, pressure-seal forms, labels, tags, envelopes, and presentation folders. Operating 56 manufacturing plants across 20 U.S. states, Ennis sells approximately 94% custom and semi-custom products primarily through independent distributors, commercial printers, direct mail companies, payroll software companies, and advertising agencies throughout the United States.

products.name: Business Forms
products.description: Snap sets, continuous forms, laser cut sheets including custom and semi-custom printed business forms.

products.name: Pressure-Seal Forms
products.description: Custom and stock pressure seal documents sold under Infoseal and PrintXcel brands.

products.name: Labels and Tags
products.description: Custom printed high-performance labels and custom/stock tags under Ennis Tag & Label and other brands.

products.name: Envelopes
products.description: Custom and imprinted envelopes under Trade Envelopes, Block Graphics, Wisco, and National Imprint Corporation brands.

products.name: Presentation Folders
products.description: Presentation and document folders under Admore, Folder Express, and Independent Folders brands.

products.name: Financial and Security Documents
products.description: Financial and security documents provided under Northstar and General Financial Supply brands.

products.name: Point of Purchase Advertising
products.description: Point of Purchase advertising materials sold under the Adams McClure brand.

products.name: School Portrait Products
products.description: Products and services for school portrait photographers under School Photo Marketing and National School Forms brands.

products.name: VersaSeal
products.description: Patented pressure-seal product line sold under VersaSeal and VersaSeal SecureX trademarks.

products.name: Integrated Products
products.description: Integrated print products offered under Integrated Print & Graphics and related brands.
